source_note: Management & Operations Audit, PA PUC Bureau of Audits — cover 'Issued July 2019', Docket No. D-2018-3000838; 18 recommendations. PDF: puc.pa.gov/pcdocs/1630850.pdf. The cover prints only the month, so issued_date is left null to avoid false precision (cf. CPUC month-only precedent). The original 2019 announcement is not in the current PUC press-release archive; source_page_url is the 2023 Management Efficiency Investigation follow-up, which documents this audit by name. Findings & recommendations parsed verbatim from the Exhibit I-2 Summary of Recommendations.
